---
label: "Plan & Execute"
icon: "📋"
---

## Plan-and-Execute

For complex tasks, <JargonTip term="plan-and-execute">plan first, then execute</JargonTip> step by step. Separating planning from execution improves reliability.

<CodeBlock b64="" />

<Quiz question="When is Plan-and-Execute better than ReAct?" options={["Always -- planning is always better","When the task has many interdependent steps that benefit from upfront planning","When the task is simple and doesn't need tools","When speed is the top priority"]} correctIndex={1} explanation="Plan-and-Execute shines for complex, multi-step tasks where the order of operations matters. For simple tasks, ReAct's step-by-step approach is faster and more flexible." />
